---
title: "Financial Data Analysis"
description: "Exploring trends in financial markets using Python."
author: "Alina Bolshakova"
date: 2026-04-10
image: cover2.jpg
categories: [Python, Finance, Data Visualisation]
---

Project content goes here...

::::
